description: Behavioural evaluation set for the award-design skill. Cases pin archetype selection, atmosphere calibration, and the DESIGN.md output shape (Google open standard — YAML frontmatter + 8 ordered prose sections).

evals.name: selects-corporate-luxury-for-premium-saas
evals.prompt: I'm building a website for a high-end financial advisory firm. Wealth management, ultra-high-net-worth clients. They need to feel established and trustworthy.
evals.expected_output: Recommends the corporate-luxury archetype with explicit rationale tied to the brief (high-end, established, trustworthy → low Variance, low Motion, generous Density). Atmosphere scores cited from the calibration table. Output is a complete DESIGN.md with the 8 Google-standard sections.

evals.name: selects-bold-maximal-for-edgy-saas
evals.prompt: Award-worthy landing page for a developer-tooling SaaS that wants to feel cutting-edge and opinionated. Think Linear or Vercel.
evals.expected_output: Recommends bold-maximal or experimental archetype. Justifies via Variance and Motion targets from the atmosphere table. DESIGN.md uses opinionated typography choices and a confident colour palette.

evals.name: minimalist-for-small-portfolio
evals.prompt: Solo designer portfolio. Just my work, contact, no animation, classy.
evals.expected_output: Recommends minimalist archetype. Atmosphere scores: low Variance, very low Motion, high Density (whitespace). DESIGN.md emphasises typography and restraint over decoration.

evals.name: redirects-dashboard-out-of-scope
evals.prompt: Design our internal admin dashboard for the customer-success team. Lots of tables and metrics.
evals.expected_output: Declines or redirects — this skill is not for internal tooling. SKILL.md description explicitly excludes dashboards. Recommends a pragmatic data-density approach without invoking the archetype workflow.

evals.name: uses-brand-extraction-for-existing-url
evals.prompt: Redesign coroboros.com — keep the spirit, refresh the execution.
evals.expected_output: Reads `references/brand-extraction.md`, observes the live site, drafts atmosphere observations, then proposes an archetype consistent with the existing brand. Does not propose a wholesale archetype shift unless the brief asks for it.

evals.name: produces-complete-design-md
evals.prompt: Generate a DESIGN.md for a brutalist developer-tools site. Black-and-white, monospace, raw.
evals.expected_output: Output is a valid Google-standard DESIGN.md: YAML frontmatter with `colors`, `typography`, `rounded`, `spacing`, `components` tokens, plus all 8 prose sections in canonical order (Overview, Colors, Typography, Layout, Elevation & Depth, Shapes, Components, Do's and Don'ts). No section is left empty or stubbed.

evals.name: validates-with-design-system-audit
evals.prompt: Generate a DESIGN.md for a minimalist portfolio and validate it.
evals.expected_output: After generating DESIGN.md, runs `/design-system audit DESIGN.md` (or falls back to `npx @google/design.md lint`) to catch broken token references and contrast violations. Reports any findings.
